tasks.subject: Task 0: PHPUnit dev harness
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a browser-free PHPUnit setup so the new pure classes can be unit-tested.

**Files:** composer.json, phpunit.xml.dist, tests/Unit/.gitkeep, .gitignore

**Verify:** composer test-unit -> PHPUnit banner, exit 0 with 'No tests executed!'

```json:metadata
{"files": ["composer.json", "phpunit.xml.dist", "tests/Unit/.gitkeep", ".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "composer test-unit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PHPUnit ^10 installed as dev dep", "composer test-unit exits 0 with no tests", "existing tests script unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: TestRunSummary (exit-code decision)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A pure accumulator that answers 'did any test fail across all suites?'.

**Files:** src/Reports/TestRunSummary.php, tests/Unit/Reports/TestRunSummaryTest.php

**API:** add(array $stats): void ; totalFailures(): int ; hasFailures(): bool

**Verify:** vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Reports/TestRunSummaryTest.php -> 4 green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/Reports/TestRunSummary.php", "tests/Unit/Reports/TestRunSummaryTest.php"], "verifyCommand": "vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Reports/TestRunSummaryTest.php", "acceptanceCriteria": ["add() accumulates failures", "hasFailures() true iff >0", "missing failures key = 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: JUnitReport (XML serialiser)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Convert accumulated suite results into a well-formed JUnit XML string via DOMDocument.

**Files:** src/Reports/JUnitReport.php, tests/Unit/Reports/JUnitReportTest.php

**API:** addSuite(array $results): void ; render(): string

**Mapping:** suite -> testsuite(name/tests/failures/errors=0/skipped=skips+skippeds+todos/time s 3dec); pass -> testcase; fail -> +failure(message=implode expect['fail']); skip/skipped/todo -> +skipped.

**Verify:** vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Reports/JUnitReportTest.php -> 5 green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/Reports/JUnitReport.php", "tests/Unit/Reports/JUnitReportTest.php"], "verifyCommand": "vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Reports/JUnitReportTest.php", "acceptanceCriteria": ["well-formed JUnit XML", "testsuite attrs correct", "fail/skip/pass children correct", "special chars escaped"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire --junit and exit code into ExecuteSuite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Feed each executed suite into both new classes, write the JUnit file when requested, return failing exit code when any test failed.

**Files:** src/Command/ExecuteSuite.php

**Changes:** import JUnitReport+TestRunSummary; configure() add --junit VALUE_OPTIONAL default false; execute() instantiate summary/report, resolve junitPath; in isExecutable block after warnings loop feed summary->add(getStats()) and report->addSuite(results(false)); at end write file if junitPath!==null and return summary->hasFailures()?FAILURE:SUCCESS; keep empty-folder early returns as SUCCESS.

**Verify (integration, needs PrestaShop):** bin/prestaflow run --junit=/tmp/junit.xml src/Tests/Suites/Fails ; echo exit=$? -> exit=1, <failure present, xmllint ok. composer test-unit stays green (9 tests).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/Command/ExecuteSuite.php"], "verifyCommand": "composer test-unit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["exit 1 on failure / 0 otherwise / empty=0", "--junit three-state path behaviour", "--junit independent of --output"]}
```
